picks.rationale: Wind OUT 29.5 mph at 76F creates OVER environment but both bullpens SEVERE + BELOW_AVERAGE (4.54 and 4.93 ERA) also lean OVER. However, both teams back-to-back road/home creates fatigue. Sharp money on Cardinals at +102 vs consensus +50 opposes Guardians ML. Park 0.97 pitcher lean conflicts with wind. Total 8.5 at -102 UNDER has no clear edge — wind says OVER, park says UNDER, bullpens say OVER but quality is poor not elite. No clean bet.
